transitions: background-size 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.785, 0.135, 0.15, 0.86), background-position 0.45s steps(1), color 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.785, 0.135, 0.15, 0.86), border 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.785, 0.135, 0.15, 0.86)
opacity 0.15s ease-in-out, transform 0.15s ease-in-out, visibility 0.15s ease-in-out

color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), text-decoration-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), fill 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), stroke 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)

rules.cssText: .features--button-transition :is(.button, .shopify-challenge__button, .shopify-payment-button__button--unbranded):not([disabled]):hover { border-color: rgb(var(--button-background, var(--button-background-primary))); color: rgb(var(--button-background, var(--button-background-primary))); background-position: var(--hover-background-position); background-size: 0px 100%, 100% 100%; }
.button-group--same-width { grid-auto-columns: minmax(0px, 1fr); grid-auto-flow: column; display: grid; }
.circle-button.hover\:animate-icon-inline:hover svg { animation: 0.35s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal forwards running animateIconInline; }
.circle-button.hover\:animate-icon-block:hover svg { animation: 0.35s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal forwards running animateIconBlock; }
.floating-controls-container > .is-scrollable ~ .prev-next-button { z-index: 1; display: grid; position: absolute; inset-block-start: calc(50% - 1.5625rem); }
.popover::part(base) { place-items: end center; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: grid; position: fixed; inset: 0px; }
.popover::part(content) { border: 1px solid rgb(var(--border-color)); box-shadow: 2px 2px 6px rgb(var(--text-color) / .05); width: max-content; max-width: 18.75rem; max-height: min(60vh, 25rem); }
.product-card__quick-add-button { opacity: 1; transition: opacity 0.2s ease-in-out, transform 0.2s ease-in-out; transform: translateY(5px); }
.quick-buy-modal__content { grid-template-columns: minmax(0px, 0.9fr) minmax(0px, 1fr); align-items: center; column-gap: 0.5rem; display: grid; }
.social-media--block .social-media__item:hover { background: rgb(var(--branding-background)); outline-color: rgb(var(--branding-background)); color: rgb(var(--branding-color)); z-index: 1; }
.social-media--block .social-media__item { background: rgb(var(--branding-background)); outline-color: rgb(var(--branding-background)); color: rgb(var(--branding-color)); }

[data-tooltip]::after { content: attr(data-tooltip); inset-block-end: calc(100% + var(--tooltip-offset, .5rem)); border-radius: min(1.5rem,var(--button-border-radius)); background: rgb(var(--tooltip-text-color)); color: rgb(var(--tooltip-background)); visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; justify-self: center; width: max-content; max-width: 15rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.6875rem; transition: opacity 0.1s ease-in-out, visibility 0.1s ease-in-out, scale 0.1s ease-in-out; position: absolute; left: 50%; translate: -50%; scale: 0.9; }
.is-scrollable[allow-drag]:active { cursor: grabbing; user-select: none; scroll-snap-type: none; }
.article__footer { grid: auto / auto-flow minmax(0px, 1fr); align-items: center; }
.cart-recap { text-align: end; justify-items: end; margin-inline-start: auto; }
.collection-toolbar__products-count { position: absolute; inset-block-start: 50%; inset-inline-start: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
.facets-sidebar { top: calc(var(--sticky-area-height) + var(--collection-toolbar-height, 0px) + 20px); width: var(--collection-sidebar-width); grid-column-end: -2; display: block; position: sticky; }
.countdown { grid-template-columns: minmax(250px, 570px) max-content; justify-content: space-between; gap: 4rem; width: 100%; }
.footer__block-list { justify-content: var(--footer-content-justify-items); flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 3rem; display: flex; }
.image-with-text-block--parallax > svg, .image-with-text-block--parallax > picture img { min-height: 100vh; position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; }

.images-with-text-scroll__container { --image-width: min(50vw - var(--container-gutter), 575px); --image-height: min(var(--image-width), var(--image-width) / var(--images-with-text-scroll-master-image-ratio)); --content-padding: calc((100vh - var(--image-height) - var(--sticky-area-height)) / 2); grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0px, 1fr)); grid-auto-rows: minmax(0px, 1fr); align-items: center; padding-block-start: var(--content-padding); padding-block-end: var(--content-padding); }

.images-with-text-scroll__image { height: var(--image-height); object-fit: contain; object-position: center center; position: sticky; inset-block-start: calc(var(--content-padding) + var(--sticky-area-height)); }
.prev-next-blog-posts { grid: auto / auto-flow minmax(min-content, 31.25rem); justify-content: center; gap: 1.875rem; }

.product-sticky-bar { inset-block: var(--sticky-area-height) auto; background: rgb(var(--background)); border-block-end-width: 1px; grid-template-columns: minmax(0px, 1fr) max-content; align-items: center; padding-block: 1.125rem; display: grid; }

.shopify-section--shop-the-look::before { content: ""; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; background: rgb(var(--background)); z-index: 2; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: opacity 0.4s; position: fixed; inset-block-start: 0px; inset-inline-start: 0px; }

.shop-the-look__item { max-width: var(--container-sm-max-width); grid: auto / min(550px, 60%) minmax(0px, 1fr); grid-area: 1 / -1; align-items: center; gap: 0.3125rem; margin-inline: auto; display: grid; }
.shop-the-look__item-content { opacity: 0; justify-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; display: grid; }
.text-with-icons:not(.text-with-icons--stacked) { grid: auto / auto-flow 100%; gap: 0px; display: grid; }
.timeline__carousel::after { content: ""; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); position: absolute; inset: 0px; }
.timeline__item-content { text-align: center; z-index: 1; align-self: center; padding-block: 3.75rem; }
.timeline__nav { background: rgb(var(--timeline-nav-mobile-background)); color: rgb(var(--timeline-nav-mobile-text-color)); padding-block: 1.25rem; overflow: auto hidden; }
.features--zoom-image .zoom-image { transform-origin: center center; transition: scale 8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); }

.header-sidebar__promo--blocks { display: grid; gap: 1.5em 1rem; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0px, 1fr)); overscroll-behavior-x: initial !important; overflow: initial !important; grid-auto-flow: initial !important; }

.cart-drawer--custom { padding-inline-start: var(--drawer-body-padding-inline); padding-inline-end: var(--drawer-body-padding-inline); margin-inline-start: var(--drawer-body-padding-inline); margin-inline-end: var(--drawer-body-padding-inline); }

.routing-routeTransitionSlideLeft-BiL6W.routing-opening-vHc3x, .routing-routeTransitionSlideLeft-BiL6W.routing-closing-vOJGr, .routing-routeTransitionSlideRight-fb0fx.routing-opening-vHc3x, .routing-routeTransitionSlideRight-fb0fx.routing-closing-vOJGr, .routing-routeTransitionSlideOverLeft-ZElfk.routing-opening-vHc3x, .routing-routeTransitionSlideOverLeft-ZElfk.routing-closing-vOJGr, .routing-routeTransitionSlideOverRight-CGiVC.routing-opening-vHc3x, .routing-routeTransitionSlideOverRight-CGiVC.routing-closing-vOJGr { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }
.ProgressBar-animateFromEmpty-_pRY0 { animation: 300ms ease-out 0s 1 normal none running ProgressBar-animateEmpty-w1eHC; }
.TypingIndicator-shimmerText-lqytr { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; background: text currentcolor; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
.Drawer-drawerParent-rvbPa.Drawer-transformationMode-p4lB_ { transition: none; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

.Drawer-drawerParent-rvbPa.Drawer-transformationMode-p4lB_.Drawer-opening-fG0f6, .Drawer-drawerParent-rvbPa.Drawer-transformationMode-p4lB_:not(.Drawer-closing-nay3K) { top: var(--open-top); bottom: var(--open-bottom); width: var(--panel-width); border-radius: var(--atlas-drawer-inset-border-radius, 12px); }

.Drawer-drawerParent-rvbPa.Drawer-transformationMode-p4lB_.Drawer-closing-nay3K { top: var(--closed-top); bottom: var(--closed-bottom); width: var(--closed-size); border-radius: var(--atlas-widget-starting-radius); opacity: 0; }

.Drawer-drawerParent-rvbPa.Drawer-transformationMode-p4lB_.Drawer-opening-fG0f6 > *, .Drawer-drawerParent-rvbPa.Drawer-transformationMode-p4lB_:not(.Drawer-closing-nay3K) > * { opacity: 1; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }
.Drawer-drawerParent-rvbPa.Drawer-transformationMode-p4lB_.Drawer-closing-nay3K > * { opacity: 0; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }
.HubLauncherButton-alertContainer-QiDQs { padding-left: var(--atlas-space-8); padding-right: var(--atlas-space-8); margin-bottom: var(--atlas-space-16); gap: var(--atlas-space-8); }
.HubLauncher-bounceLeft-Ss6kQ, .HubLauncher-bounceRight-iWzoq, .HubLauncher-bounceBottomLeft-Ltwkk, .HubLauncher-bounceBottomRight-xEccb { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

.kl_reviews__lightbox__content_wrapper { margin: -64px 0px 0px; top: 0px; bottom: auto; padding-bottom: 0px; position: relative; width: 1000px; max-height: 852px; border-radius: 24px; height: calc(-112px + 100vh); }

.kl_reviews__lightbox__image_list .swiper-horizontal { background: rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.4); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16); box-shadow: rgba(55, 63, 71, 0.04) 0px 0px 0px 1px, rgba(55, 63, 71, 0.16) 0px 1px 4px; height: 56px; max-width: 472px; border-radius: 8px; margin: 5px !important; }
.kl_reviews__list:not(.kl_preview *) iframe { border: none; display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 1000; }
.kl_reviews__review__image_row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; max-width: 100%; overflow-x: hidden; }
.kl_reviews__widget_onboarding_modal__content { width: 342px; height: auto; min-height: 182px; display: flex; flex-direction: column-reverse; align-items: center; padding: 0px 16px 16px; }
.kl_reviews__widget_onboarding_modal__close_button { align-self: end; position: relative; top: 8px; right: -4px; overflow: visible; }
.kl_reviews__submission_modal__frame { width: 98vw; max-width: 100vw; height: 85vh; max-height: 95vh; overflow-x: hidden; }

#coi-expand div { border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(117, 117, 117); border-image: initial; border-width: 0px 4px 4px 0px; padding: 3px; width: 20px; height: 20px; transform: rotate(225deg); position: relative; margin: 15px auto; }
.coi_expanded .coi-banner__footer { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: flex-start; padding: 10px; }
.coi-banner-consent-field { justify-content: center; border-right: 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); flex: 1 0 50%; padding: 10px 0px; }

customProperties.--atlas-font-family-mono: ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "Oxygen Mono", "Ubuntu Monospace", "Cantarell", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Mono", "Droid Sans Mono", Verdana, monospace
